Mtn To Stay Proceeding Pending Arbitration Pursuant To Pltfs' Demand For Arbitration
Off Calendar Nov-06-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
DEFENDANTS SERVICEMASTER GLOBAL HOLDINGS, INC., THE SERVICEMASTER COMPANY INC., THE TERMINIX INTERNATIONAL COMPANY, LP, AND TERMINIX INTERNATIONAL, INCORPORATED'S Motion To Stay Proceeding Pending Arbitration Pursuant To Pltfs' Demand For Arbitration IS Granted. The responding party does not oppose the motion. ORDER SIGNED WITH THE MOVING PAPERS. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Angie Diner CSR # 9581 =302/EG
